message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

participant BTManager
participant BTCallback
participant BleController
participant ScannerPresenter
participant LeScannerV21
participant WristbandManager
participant L2Layer
participant L2KeyPacket
participant L2CMDPacket
participant L1Layer
participant L1Packet
participant GattLayer
participant BluetoothGatt

note over BTManager, BluetoothGatt: band301

== 搜索设备 ==

BTManager -> WristbandManager: onCreate
BTManager -> BleController: initial
BleController -> ScannerPresenter: new
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21: new
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: new
L2Layer -> L1Layer: new
L1Layer -> L1Packet: new
L1Packet -> GattLayer: new

note left of 搜索蓝牙设备: 搜索蓝牙设备
搜索蓝牙设备 -> BleController: forceLeScan
BleController -> 搜索蓝牙设备: scanDevice
搜索蓝牙设备 -> BleController: scanDevice
BleController -> LeScannerV21: scanLe
LeScannerV21 -> BleController: scanLeDevice
BleController -> LeScannerV21: startScan
LeScannerV21 -> BleController: onScanResult
BleController -> LeScannerV21: notifyLeScan
LeScannerV21 -> BleController: onLeScan
BleController -> WristbandManager: onNewDevice
WristbandManager -> BTCallback: mHandler.handleMessage
BTCallback -> WristbandManager: MSG_FIND_BONDED_DEVICE

== 建立GATT连接 ==

note over WristbandManager: Connect：找到你连接的地址后，使用该地址进行蓝牙连接

WristbandManager -> L2Layer: connect
L2Layer -> GattLayer: connect
GattLayer -> GattLayer: startTxSchedule
GattLayer -> GattLayer: startRxSchedule
note over GattLayer: 开启两个线程，Tx发送，Rx接收
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt: connect

BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onConnectionStateChange
note over GattLayer: 设置MTU：240
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt: requestMtu
BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onMtuChanged
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt: discoverServices
BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onServicesDiscovered
note over GattLayer: 通过UUID，发现我们设置的Services和数据接收Characteristic
BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onDescriptorWrite
GattLayer -> L1Layer: mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L1Layer -> L2Layer: mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L2Layer -> WristbandManager: mApplicationCallback.onConnectionStateChange
WristbandManager -> BTCallback: mHandler.handleMessage
BTCallback -> WristbandManager: MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager: StartLoginProcess
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: RequestLogin
L2Layer -> WristbandManager: RequestSetNeedInfo
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: SetUserProfile
L2Layer -> WristbandManager:

== 封装并发送数据-Tx ==

WristbandManager -> L2Layer: SettingCmdUserSetting
L2Layer -> L2KeyPacket: preparePacket：key(数) data,len(≥8),data
note left of L2Layer: 封装L2
L2Layer -> L2CMDPacket: preparePacket：cmd(1B) version(1B)
L2Layer -> L1Layer: sendData
note left of L1Layer: 封装L1
L1Layer -> L1Packet: prepareDataPacket
L1Packet -> L1Layer: preparePacket
note over L1Packet: magic:AB, er-ack-version:00, len(2B),crc(2B),seq(2B)
L1Layer -> L1Layer: addToTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer: ThreadTx.run
note over L1Layer: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有数据，有就发送，重试s次
L1Layer -> L1Layer: getFromTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer: UnpackSendPacket
note over L1Layer: 要发送的数据内为每20个字节发送一次，直到发送完毕
L1Layer -> GattLayer: sendGattLayerData
GattLayer -> L1Layer: sendData
L1Layer -> GattLayer: checkPacketSend
note over L1Layer: 反馈发送成功，SequenceId++
GattLayer -> L2Layer: onDataSend

== 接收数据-Rx ==

BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onCharacteristicChanged
GattLayer -> L1Layer: mGattCallback.onDataReceive
L1Layer -> GattLayer: receiveData
GattLayer -> L1Layer: decodeReceiveData
note left of L1Layer: 封装L1
L1Layer -> L1Layer: parseHeader:解析(magic,ack,总长度,crc,sequence)
L1Layer -> L1Layer: parseAckPacket
note over L1Layer: 如果接收的数据包长度等于1中记录的总长度则返回LT_FULL_PACKET\n否则，把数据暂存起来（作为SAB），返回LT_FULL_PACKET后进行汇聚
L1Layer -> L1Layer: addToRxPacketList
note over L1Layer: 向手环发送成功的Ack
L1Layer -> L1Layer: ThreadRx.run
note over L1Layer: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有数据，有就拆包
L1Layer -> L1Layer: getFromRxPacketList
L1Layer -> L2Layer: onDataReceive
note left of L2Layer: 拆包L2
L2Layer -> L2CMDPacket: parseData:拆包L2,cmd(1B),version(1B)
L2Layer -> L2KeyPacket: parseData:拆包key(1B),len(28),data

== handshake ==

WristbandManager -> L2Layer: handshake
L2Layer -> L1Layer: handshake
L1Layer -> GattLayer: handshake
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt: sendData
BluetoothGatt -> GattLayer: onDataReceive
GattLayer -> L1Layer: onHandshakeCallback
L1Layer -> L2Layer: onHandshakeCallback
L2Layer -> WristbandManager: onHandshakeCallback

@enduml
